title: Nonexistence results for elliptic differential inequalities with a   potential in bounded domains
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1406.1093
summary:
In this paper we are concerned with a class of elliptic differential
inequalities with a potential in bounded domains both of $\mathbf{R}^m$ and of
Riemannian manifolds. In particular, we investigate the effect of the behavior
of the potential at the boundary of the domain on nonexistence of nonnegative
solutions.
